title: Copper Lanterns
description: Remodels lanterns to a lovely nautical-like copper variant!
body:
Gives all your lanterns an interesting, nautical-like appearance!

This resource pack is no longer being updated as of the addition of copper lanterns to Minecraft. If you would like to experience this effect in versions post-1.21.8, check out my new pack [Improved Lanterns](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/improved-lanterns)!
